'''Keena''' was an individual who went to [[Screecher's Reach]] with [[Daal]], [[Quinn]], and [[Baython]].<ref name="Screecher" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
===Development===
Keena appeared in "[[Screecher's Reach (short film)|Screecher's Reach]]," the second episode of ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]{{'}}'' [[Star Wars: Visions Volume 2|second volume]], which premiered on [[Disney+]] on [[May 4]], [[2023]]. She was voiced by [[Molly McCann]].<ref name="Screecher" /> [[Federico Pirovano]] created multiple concept art pieces of keena.<ref name="PirovanoWebsite">{{WebCite|url=https://federicopirovano.com/star-wars-visions-season-2|text=Star Wars Visions Season 2 — Federico Pirovano|archiveurl=https://archive.is/3AoTY}}</ref>
